title: ExportMemoryLine
description: Per-memory NDJSON line emitted by `sqlite-graphrag export` on stdout. One line per memory, followed by a single ExportSummary line.

memory_type.description: Alias of `type` for agents that parse `.memory_type` instead of `.type`. Always equal to `type`.

deleted_at_iso.description: Present only when `--include-deleted` is used and the memory is soft-deleted.
